summary: The diff clearly modifies the neighbourhood catalog file, but the content is truncated, so key REQ-1 acceptance criteria (complete coverage of all requested areas, ID sequencing/uniqueness, and no runtime issues in Discover) cannot be fully verified from the provided evidence. No unrequested features are evident in the listed modified files.
